ResearchProjectDef.label: twisted stomach
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft an artificial stomach that uses twisted mechanites to maintain nutrition for its host.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Combat Mechanites
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft a serum that can forceably afflict the victim with various mechanites.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Mechanite Manipulation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Utilize the study of how fleshminds are formed to put twisted mechanites to work... on your behalf.\n\nThere's a lot of advancements that can be made once we understand how mass is twisted by these mechanites.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Mechanite Pills
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft a drug that causes immediate relief from some forms of mechanites, purging them from a user's system.
